name: vercel
description: Comprehensive Vercel plugin with connector app, Codex-compatible skills, hooks, and MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Vercel ecosystem guidance, MCP, docs, and deploy tools
interface.longDescription: Bring the full Vercel ecosystem into Codex with the Vercel connector app, curated skills, project-profiling hooks, and the official Vercel MCP server. This canonical `vercel` plugin now subsumes the previous `vercel-plugin` bundle.
defaultPrompt: Audit this repo for Vercel deployment risks
